# Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries

> Camitrade Investment Fiduciaries is a leading global fiduciary and licensing services provider, helping businesses incorporate, license, and operate compliantly across 10+ jurisdictions. We serve fintech founders, fund managers, crypto companies, payment service providers, insurance firms, and international entrepreneurs.

Camitrade operates offices in Mauritius (HQ), Kenya, Seychelles, UAE (Dubai), Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, and Cyprus. Our compliance-first philosophy means we build regulatory foundations that scale — reducing risk, attracting investors, and avoiding costly corrective work down the line.

Contact: info@camitrade.com | Suite 201, The Catalyst, 40 Silicon Avenue, Ebene, Mauritius

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.camitrade.com/): Global fiduciary and licensing services overview, trust signals, industries served, and how we work.
- [About Us](https://www.camitrade.com/about): Our story, founding philosophy, compliance-first approach, core values, and team perspective.
- [Contact](https://www.camitrade.com/contact): Office locations, contact form, and WhatsApp consultation booking.
- [Special Offers](https://www.camitrade.com/offers): Current promotional packages for company formation and licensing services.
- [Global Jurisdictions](https://www.camitrade.com/jurisdictions): Browse 195+ countries by continent for business expansion research.

## Corporate Services

- [Corporate Services Overview](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services): Full suite of corporate formation and administration services.
- [International Business Company (IBC) Formation](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/IBC_Formation): Offshore IBC incorporation across multiple jurisdictions.
- [Registered Agent Services](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Registered_Agent_Services): Statutory registered agent and local presence solutions.
- [Trust and Foundation Registration](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Trust_and_Foundation_Registration): Asset protection trusts and private foundations.
- [Nominee Director and Shareholder Services](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Nominee_Director_and_Shareholder_Services): Privacy and compliance nominee arrangements.
- [Bank Account Opening](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Bank_Account_Opening): Corporate and personal bank account facilitation globally.
- [Accounting and Auditing](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Accounting_and_Auditing): Bookkeeping, financial statements, and audit support.
- [Legal Opinions](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Legal_Opinions): Jurisdiction-specific legal opinions and regulatory guidance.
- [Virtual and Physical Office Services](https://www.camitrade.com/corporate-services/Virtual_Office_Services): Registered address, mail handling, and office solutions.

## Licensing Services

- [Licensing Services Overview](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services): Regulatory licensing across financial services, fintech, crypto, gaming, insurance, and banking.
- [Investment Dealer License (Mauritius)](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Investment_Dealer_License): FSC-regulated investment dealer licenses; 30–45 day processing, USD 15k minimum capital.
- [Brokerage and Forex Licenses](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Brokerage_License): Multi-jurisdiction forex and securities brokerage licensing.
- [Cryptocurrency and VASP Licenses](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Crypto_VASP_License): Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) registration and licensing.
- [Gaming and Gambling Licenses](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Gaming_License): Online gaming, sports betting, and casino operator licenses.
- [Insurance Licenses](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Insurance_License): Captive, reinsurance, portfolio insurance, and broker licenses.
- [Banking Licenses](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Banking_License): Full banking and offshore banking license applications.
- [Compliance Officer Outsourcing](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Compliance_Officer): Outsourced MLRO, compliance officer, and regulatory reporting.
- [Post-Licensing Support](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Post_Licensing_Support): Ongoing regulatory compliance, renewals, and filings post-license.
- [Professional Indemnity Assistance](https://www.camitrade.com/licensing-services/Professional_Indemnity): PI insurance procurement and risk management guidance.

## Other Specialist Services

- [Other Services Overview](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services): Specialist services beyond standard corporate and licensing.
- [Aircraft and Ship Registration](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Aircraft_Ship_Registration): Offshore aircraft and vessel registration for asset protection.
- [Assets and Investment Advisory](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Assets_Investment_Advisory): Portfolio structuring and cross-border investment advisory.
- [Electronic and Money Services Businesses (MSB)](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/MSB): E-money institution setup and money services business licensing.
- [Foundations and Non-Profits](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Foundations_Non_Profits): Private foundations and non-profit organization registration.
- [Investments and Funds](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Investments_Funds): Investment fund structuring, licensing, and administration.
- [Limited Liability Companies (LLC)](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/LLC): Multi-jurisdiction LLC formation and administration.
- [Offshore Company Incorporation](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Offshore_Company): Offshore holding and operating company structures.
- [Pension Services](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Pension_Services): Offshore pension plan setup and administration.
- [Trademark Registration](https://www.camitrade.com/other-services/Trademark_Registration): International trademark filing and IP protection.

## Payment Solutions

- [Payment Solutions Overview](https://www.camitrade.com/payments): Online card collection, merchant acquiring, payouts, mobile money, and API integrations. Supports VISA, Mastercard, Amex, Diners, Discover, and JCB. Covers Africa, Latin America, and international markets.
- [PSP Services Overview](https://www.camitrade.com/psp-services): Payment System Provider licensing and setup across regulated African jurisdictions.
- [Zambia Payments Systems Business License](https://www.camitrade.com/psp-services/Zambia_PSP): Bank of Zambia (BoZ) regulated payments systems business license.
- [Nigeria PSSP License](https://www.camitrade.com/psp-services/Nigeria_PSSP): Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) regulated Payment Solution Service Provider license.

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Founded**: 2010
- **Headquarters**: Ebene, Mauritius
- **Other Offices**: Nairobi (Kenya), Mahe (Seychelles), Dubai (UAE), Kingston (Saint Vincent and the Grenadines), Cyprus
- **Jurisdictions Covered**: 10+ active jurisdictions across Africa, Europe, Middle East, and offshore centers
- **Client Types**: Fintech startups, crypto companies, fund managers, PSPs, insurance firms, banks, international entrepreneurs
- **Core Differentiator**: Compliance-first, end-to-end service from incorporation through ongoing regulatory support
- **Languages**: English
- **Phone**: +248 2 668 292 (Customer Service), +971 56 106 6155 (Sales), +254 715 826 827, +357 95 990 867
- **Email**: info@camitrade.com (general), sales@camitrade.com (sales)
- **Social**: LinkedIn (camitrade-investment-fiduciaries), Facebook, Instagram (camitradeinvestmentfiduciaries), X/Twitter (@CFiduciaries)
